form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after 10 months 5th of 7 at this track on March 10 over 1400m, 16 len behind Codi Master with 52kg at $18.40. Previously second-up ran last of 13 at Palermo on May 30 over 1300m, 21 len behind Taciano with 57kg at $44.80. Unlikely to threaten.

form.formComment: Comes off a 35 day let-up. Most recently in a small field at this track on March 4 over 1600m, 14 len behind Real Sale with 55kg at $5.95. The run before that 4th in a small field at this track on February 18 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Ritmo Unico carrying 53kg at $5.85. Can't recommend against this lot.

form.formComment: Entire back from a spell of three-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign second last of 10 at Palermo December 19 over 1200m, 27 len behind Otto Kid carrying 57kg at $10.45. When resuming last campaign second of 10 at this track August 20 over 1200m, 6 len behind Jefe Pesado with 57kg at $5.80. Likely to feature.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run 3rd of 10 at La Plata on March 15 over 1200m, 7 len behind Ventiluz with 57kg at $7.85. Before that 2nd of 10 at La Plata on February 24 over 1200m, on rain affected going; 0.1 len behind Preludio De Giron with 53kg at $45.70. Should be right in the finish.
